# Tencent RTC

> Tencent RTC is a one-stop real-time audio/video solution covering Instant Messaging (Chat UIKit), Audio/Video Calling (TUICallKit), Live Streaming & Voice Chat (LiveKit), Video Conferencing (TUIRoomKit), and the underlying RTC Engine SDK.
> It supports Android, iOS, Flutter, React, Vue, uni-app and more, with pre-built UI components for rapid integration.

## Docs

- [AI Agent Real-Time Communication Onboarding](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/quick-start.md): Set up AI Agent environment from scratch, integrate Tencent RTC SDKs (Chat/Call/Live/Room/TRTC) via Cursor/VS Code + MCP Server to build IM, calls, live streaming and conferencing apps.
- [Configure MCP Server](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/mcp.md): Add Tencent RTC MCP Server configuration in Cursor/VS Code, set SDKAppID and SDKSecretKey environment variables to enable Chat/Call/Live/Room/TRTC tool capabilities.
- [Configure RTC Skills](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/skills.md): Configure AI Agent's RTC Skills package to load Chat UIKit, TUICallKit, LiveKit, RoomKit, TRTC Engine integration capabilities and best practice rules.

### Chat UIKit
> IM chat components with conversation list, chat window, contact management and full messaging capabilities.

- [Integrate Android Chat UIKit (TUIKit Compose)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/chatuikit/integration.md): Integrate TUIKit Compose chat components in Android, using ChatPage, ConversationsPage, ContactsPage to build IM apps. Requires Android Studio Ladybug 2024.2.1+, JDK 17+.
- [Web Chat UIKit Component List (atomicx)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/chatuikit/features/overview.md): View all 25 atomicx components in @tencentcloud/chat-uikit-react/vue3: TUIKit, Chat, ConversationList, MessageList, MessageInput, ContactList, Search, ChatSetting, Avatar, etc.
- [Troubleshoot Android Chat UIKit Issues](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/chatuikit/faq/android.md): Resolve build errors, initialization failures, login exceptions and runtime issues in Android TUIKit Compose and IM SDK integration. Includes V2TIMManager init and client-api troubleshooting.
- [Chat UIKit Billing, Server & Common Issues](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/chatuikit/faq/common.md): Compare Chat UIKit free vs paid editions, billing models, troubleshoot server REST API failures and callback configuration. Includes server error code reference.
- [Troubleshoot Flutter Chat UIKit Issues](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/chatuikit/faq/flutter.md): Resolve dependency conflicts, build errors, login exceptions and compatibility issues in Flutter TUIKit and TencentImSDKPlugin integration.
- [Troubleshoot iOS Chat UIKit Issues](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/chatuikit/faq/ios.md): Resolve compilation and runtime issues in iOS TUIChat_Swift/TUIConversation_Swift CocoaPods integration and IM SDK V2TIMManager initialization exceptions.
- [Troubleshoot Web Chat UIKit Issues](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/chatuikit/faq/web.md): Resolve browser compatibility, TypeScript errors, bundling and runtime issues in @tencentcloud/chat-uikit-react/vue3. Includes Web IM SDK error code reference.
- [ChatHeader Component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/chatuikit/features/chat-header.md): Customize ChatHeader component with title, avatar and action buttons, supports React/Vue frameworks.
- [ChatSetting Component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/chatuikit/features/chat-setting.md): Customize ChatSetting component for muting, pinning and clearing chat settings.
- [ContactList Component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/chatuikit/features/contact-list.md): Customize ContactList for friends list, group list and blocklist, implementing contacts page and friend management.
- [ConversationActions Component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/chatuikit/features/conversation-actions.md): Customize ConversationActions for conversation delete, pin, mute and mark unread/read operations.
- [ConversationList Component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/chatuikit/features/conversation-list.md): Customize ConversationList component for conversation previews (last message, unread count), supporting search, create and pin.
- [ConversationPreview Item Component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/chatuikit/features/conversation-preview.md): Customize ConversationPreview component for single conversation item with unread count, last message and actions.
- [ConversationSearch Component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/chatuikit/features/conversation-search.md): Customize ConversationSearch component to search users, groups and messages with search box and advanced search.
- [MessageInput Component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/chatuikit/features/message-input.md): Customize MessageInput component with emoji, image, file and other message type sending capabilities.
- [MessageList Component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/chatuikit/features/message-list.md): Customize MessageList for history messages, scroll loading, multi-type message rendering and bubble styles.
- [Search Global Component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/chatuikit/features/search.md): Customize Search component for global search of contacts, groups and chat history.
- [Customize Chat UIKit Theme (Android/iOS/Flutter)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/chatuikit/features/theme.md): Customize chat UI theme colors, dark mode and visual styles via TUIKit, supporting Android Compose, iOS Swift and Flutter platforms.

### TUICallKit
> Audio/video calling components for WeChat-style one-to-one and group calls.

- [Integrate TUICallKit Audio/Video Calling](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/callkit/integration.md): Quick integration of TUICallKit audio/video calling for Android (tuicallkit-kt), iOS (TUICallKit_Swift), Flutter (tencent_calls_uikit), React (@trtc/calls-uikit-react), Vue (@trtc/calls-uikit-vue).
- [Android TUICallKit FAQ & API Reference](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/callkit/faq/android.md): Resolve audio/video permissions, call connection failures and UI issues in Android tuicallkit-kt. Includes TUICallKit API and TUICallObserver callback API documentation.
- [TUICallKit Error Code Reference](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/callkit/faq/common.md): View complete TUICallKit error code list to identify issues and solutions for call initiation, answering and hang-up.
- [Flutter TUICallKit FAQ & API Reference](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/callkit/faq/flutter.md): Resolve platform adaptation, permission and build issues in Flutter tencent_calls_uikit. Includes TUICallKit API, TUICallObserver callbacks, TUICallParams type definitions.
- [iOS TUICallKit FAQ & API Reference](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/callkit/faq/ios.md): Resolve compilation errors and call issues in iOS TUICallKit_Swift/Professional CocoaPods integration. Includes TUICallKit API and TUICallObserver callback API documentation.
- [Troubleshoot Web TUICallKit Issues](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/callkit/faq/web.md): Resolve component rendering, call connection and browser compatibility issues in @trtc/calls-uikit-react/vue integration.
- [TUICallEngine + TUICallKit Web/Mini Program API Reference](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/callkit/reference/api.md): View complete TUICallEngine and TUICallKit API: call(), groupCall(), accept(), hangup(), switchCallMediaType() for Web and WeChat Mini Programs.

### LiveKit
> Live streaming and voice chat room components with host broadcasting, audience viewing, co-hosting, PK battles, barrage and gifts.

#### Live Streaming
> Live streaming scenario: host broadcasting, audience viewing, co-guesting, PK battles, barrage, gifts, beauty and audio effects.

- [Integrate Live Streaming Basics (Android/iOS/Flutter/Vue)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/livekit/live/integration.md): Integrate AtomicXCore LiveKit for live streaming: host streaming (LiveCoreView/livePusher), audience viewing (livePlayer), room list, supporting Android, iOS, Flutter, Vue platforms.
- [Implement Live Audience List Management (LiveAudienceStore)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/livekit/live/features/audience-list.md): Use AtomicXCore LiveAudienceStore to manage live audience: real-time list, count, join/leave events, admin permissions and kick operations.
- [Integrate Live Audio Effects (AudioEffectStore/DeviceStore)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/livekit/live/features/audio-effect.md): Use AtomicXCore AudioEffectStore and DeviceStore for live audio effects: voice volume, ear monitoring, voice changers (little girl/man/child) and reverb effects (KTV/metallic).
- [Integrate Live Barrage System (BarrageStore)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/livekit/live/features/barrage.md): Use AtomicXCore BarrageStore for live barrage: receive/send text messages, custom business barrage (gift/like) and local system tips.
- [Integrate Live Basic Beauty (BaseBeautyStore)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/livekit/live/features/beauty.md): Use AtomicXCore BaseBeautyStore for live basic beauty: smoothing/whitening/blushing (0-9 intensity), one-click reset and state monitoring.
- [Integrate Vue Co-Guest Management Panel (CoGuestPanel)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/livekit/live/features/co-guest-panel.md): Integrate CoGuestPanel component in Vue for tab switching, co-guest request list and user management with deep style customization.
- [Implement Live Co-Guest (CoGuestStore)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/livekit/live/features/co-guest.md): Use AtomicXCore CoGuestStore for audience co-guesting: audience apply, host invite, accept/reject requests and off-mic management.
- [Implement Live Cross-Room Co-Host & PK (CoHostStore/BattleStore)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/livekit/live/features/co-host.md): Use AtomicXCore CoHostStore and BattleStore for cross-room co-hosting and PK battles: initiate/accept connection, start/end PK, timing and result judgment.
- [Integrate Live Gift System (GiftStore)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/livekit/live/features/gift.md): Use AtomicXCore GiftStore for live gift feature: gift panel, send/receive gifts, barrage gift messages and full-screen gift animations.
- [Integrate Vue Live Audience List Component (LiveAudienceList)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/livekit/live/features/live-audience-list.md): Integrate LiveAudienceList component in Vue for real-time audience avatars, count and audience detail panel.
- [Implement Live Room List (LiveListStore)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/livekit/live/features/live-list.md): Use AtomicXCore LiveListStore for room list management: fetch list, pagination, create/join/leave room and live info updates.
- [Integrate Vue Media Resource Config Panel (LiveScenePanel)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/livekit/live/features/live-scene-panel.md): Integrate LiveScenePanel component in Vue for camera, microphone, beauty settings and live mode selection.
- [Integrate Vue Live Video Component (LiveView)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/livekit/live/features/live-view.md): Integrate LiveView component in Vue for rendering host and co-guest video streams with custom layout.
- [Integrate Vue Stream Mixer Panel (StreamMixer)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/livekit/live/features/stream-mixer.md): Integrate StreamMixer panel in Vue for managing camera, screen share and image multi-source video mixing layout.

#### Voice Room
> Voice chat room scenario: host broadcasting, audience listening, voice co-guesting, cross-room PK, barrage, gifts and audio effects.

- [Integrate Voice Room Basics (Android/iOS/Flutter/uni-app)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/livekit/voice/integration.md): Integrate AtomicXCore LiveKit for voice rooms: host broadcasting (LiveSeatStore/VoiceCoreView), audience listening, room list, supporting Android, iOS, Flutter, uni-app platforms.
- [Implement Voice Room Audience List Management (LiveAudienceStore)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/livekit/voice/features/audience-list.md): Use AtomicXCore LiveAudienceStore for voice room audience management: real-time list, count, join/leave events, admin permissions and kick operations.
- [Integrate Voice Room Audio Effects (AudioEffectStore/DeviceStore)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/livekit/voice/features/audio-effect.md): Use AtomicXCore AudioEffectStore and DeviceStore for voice room audio effects: voice volume, ear monitoring, voice changers and reverb effects.
- [Integrate Voice Room Barrage System (BarrageStore)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/livekit/voice/features/barrage.md): Use AtomicXCore BarrageStore for voice room barrage: receive/send text messages, custom business barrage and local system tips.
- [Implement Voice Room Co-Guest (CoGuestStore/LiveSeatStore)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/livekit/voice/features/co-guest.md): Use AtomicXCore CoGuestStore and LiveSeatStore for voice room co-guesting: audience apply, host invite, seat management (kick/mute/lock).
- [Implement Voice Room Cross-Room Co-Host & PK (CoHostStore/BattleStore)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/livekit/voice/features/co-host.md): Use AtomicXCore CoHostStore and BattleStore for voice room cross-room co-hosting and PK battles: initiate/accept connection, start/end PK, timing and result.
- [Integrate Voice Room Gift System (GiftStore)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/livekit/voice/features/gift.md): Use AtomicXCore GiftStore for voice room gift feature: gift panel, send/receive gifts, barrage gift messages and full-screen gift animations.
- [Implement Voice Room List (LiveListStore)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/livekit/voice/features/room-list.md): Use AtomicXCore LiveListStore for voice room list: fetch list, pagination, create/join/leave room, info updates and custom metadata.

#### API Reference
- [LiveKit atomicx-core SDK State API Reference](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/livekit/reference/state-api.md): View all atomicx-core SDK State APIs: LoginStore, RoomStore, UserStore, LiveCoreViewStore, LiveSeatStore, CoGuestStore, CoHostStore, BattleStore, AudienceStore, BarrageStore, GiftStore, BaseBeautyStore, AudioEffectStore, DeviceStore modules.

#### FAQ
- [Troubleshoot LiveKit Common Issues](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/livekit/faq/common.md): Resolve common LiveKit integration issues including SDK initialization, login authentication, stream publishing/pulling and platform compatibility.

### TUIRoomKit
> Video conferencing components with multi-party meetings, screen sharing and participant management.

- [Integrate Vue TUIRoomKit (Atomicx) Video Conferencing](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/roomkit/integration.md): Clone TUIRoomKit from GitHub, integrate home.vue device detection and room.vue conference pages for full video conferencing app. Requires Vue 3.4.21+, Node.js 18+.
- [Troubleshoot Vue TUIRoomKit Issues](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/roomkit/faq/web.md): Resolve component rendering, device permission and browser compatibility issues in Vue TUIRoomKit (Atomicx) integration.
- [Integrate Vue RoomKit Basic Beauty](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/roomkit/features/beauty.md): Use TUIRoomKit free beauty panel for smoothing, whitening and blushing with real-time preview and remote effect.
- [Implement Vue RoomKit In-Meeting Call](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/roomkit/features/call-user-to-room.md): Use useRoomState API to send real-time meeting invitations to outside users, handle accept/reject and timeout.
- [Implement Vue RoomKit Device Detection](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/roomkit/features/device-detection.md): Use useDeviceState API for pre-meeting camera, microphone, speaker and network quality detection.
- [Manage Vue RoomKit Device State](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/roomkit/features/device-state.md): Use useDeviceState API to manage camera, microphone, speaker on/off and switching in meetings.
- [Implement Vue RoomKit In-Meeting Chat](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/roomkit/features/room-chat.md): Use useRoomChat API for in-meeting text, emoji, image real-time chat.
- [Manage Vue RoomKit Participants](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/roomkit/features/room-participant.md): Use useRoomParticipantState API to manage participant list, permissions, admin settings, mute all and kick operations.
- [Manage Vue RoomKit Room Lifecycle](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/roomkit/features/room-state.md): Use useRoomState API to manage room lifecycle: create, join, leave, destroy and room info updates.
- [Render Vue RoomKit Video Layout](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/roomkit/features/room-view.md): Use useRoomView API for grid layout, sidebar layout and speaker mode video rendering with custom video overlays.
- [Schedule Vue RoomKit Meeting Room](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/roomkit/features/schedule-room.md): Use useRoomState API to create scheduled meetings with time, topic, password and participant list.
- [Implement Vue RoomKit Screen Sharing](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/roomkit/features/screen-share.md): Use useDeviceState API for screen sharing, system audio sharing and permission control.
- [Use Vue RoomKit Virtual Background](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/roomkit/features/virtual-background.md): Use TUIRoomKit virtual background plugin for background blur and custom background image replacement.

### RTC Engine Web SDK
> TRTC Web SDK and plugin system providing core real-time audio/video capabilities and rich enhancement plugins.

- [Integrate TRTC Web SDK Audio/Video Calling](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/rtcengine/integration.md): npm install trtc-sdk-v5, use TRTC.create(), enterRoom(), startLocalVideo(), publish() for Web real-time audio/video calling. Requires Node.js 18+, WebRTC-supported browsers.
- [Run TRTC Web SDK Demo](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/rtcengine/quick-start.md): Clone TRTC-Simple-Demo repo, run trtc-sdk-v5 Demo locally to experience real-time audio/video calling.
- [TRTC Web SDK Plugins Overview](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/rtcengine/plugins/overview.md): Browse all trtc-sdk-v5 plugins: beauty/virtual background/AI denoiser/voice changer/media mixing/CDN streaming/device detection/network quality and 20+ plugin capabilities.
- [TRTC Common Issues & UserSig Authentication](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/rtcengine/faq/common.md): View TRTC SDK error codes and UserSig generation algorithm (HMAC-SHA256) for Java/Go/PHP/Node.js/Python/C#/C++.
- [Troubleshoot Web TRTC Issues](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/rtcengine/faq/web.md): Resolve device permissions, browser compatibility and autoplay policy issues in trtc-sdk-v5 integration.
- [Use AIDenoiser AI Noise Reduction Plugin](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/rtcengine/plugins/ai-denoiser.md): Use trtc-sdk-v5 AIDenoiser plugin to reduce background noise (keyboard/fan/mouse clicks) with far-field elimination mode.
- [Use AudioMixer Background Music Plugin](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/rtcengine/plugins/audio-mixer.md): Use trtc-sdk-v5 AudioMixer plugin to play multiple background music tracks with volume control, loop, seek and mixing output.
- [Handle Browser Auto-play Policy](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/rtcengine/plugins/auto-play-policy.md): Handle Chrome/Safari autoplay restrictions using user gesture triggers or muted autoplay strategies.
- [Use Beauty Professional Plugin](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/rtcengine/plugins/beauty.md): Use trtc-sdk-v5 Beauty plugin for smoothing, whitening, face reshaping, eye enlargement and dynamic stickers (commercial license required).
- [Custom Audio/Video Capture & Rendering](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/rtcengine/plugins/capture-rendering.md): Use trtc-sdk-v5 createCustomVideoTrack(), createCustomAudioTrack() for custom capture sources (Canvas/MediaStream) and rendering logic.
- [Use CDNStreaming Plugin](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/rtcengine/plugins/cdn-streaming.md): Use trtc-sdk-v5 CDNStreaming plugin for cloud mixing, CDN streaming and pushing mixed stream back to TRTC room.
- [Use CrossRoom Plugin](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/rtcengine/plugins/cross-room.md): Use trtc-sdk-v5 CrossRoom plugin for cross-room audio/video interaction between hosts (PK battles, cross-room co-hosting).
- [Listen Device Changes](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/rtcengine/plugins/device-change.md): Listen to trtc-sdk-v5 device-changed event to handle camera, microphone, speaker plug/unplug and device list changes.
- [Use FaceDetection Plugin](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/rtcengine/plugins/face-detection.md): Use trtc-sdk-v5 FaceDetection plugin to detect face position, count and state changes in camera in real-time.
- [Monitor Network Quality](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/rtcengine/plugins/network-quality.md): Listen to trtc-sdk-v5 network-quality event for uplink/downlink latency, packet loss and quality levels.
- [Configure Proxy Server Forwarding](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/rtcengine/plugins/proxy.md): Use TRTC.setProxyServer() to configure HTTP/HTTPS proxy server for forwarding WebRTC signaling and media traffic.
- [Use RealtimeTranscriber Plugin](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/rtcengine/plugins/realtime-transcriber.md): Use trtc-sdk-v5 RealtimeTranscriber plugin to convert speech to text in real-time with multi-language translation.
- [Use SmallStreamAutoSwitcher Plugin](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/rtcengine/plugins/small-stream-auto.md): Use trtc-sdk-v5 SmallStreamAutoSwitcher plugin to auto-switch to small stream in weak network, auto-switch back when network recovers.
- [Use Dual Stream Encoding](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/rtcengine/plugins/small-stream.md): Use startVideoStream({ small: true }) to enable dual stream, subscribers auto-switch based on network for smooth playback.
- [Detect WebRTC Browser Compatibility](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/rtcengine/plugins/support-detection.md): Use TRTC.isSupported() to detect WebRTC support, H.264 codec and camera/microphone permissions in browsers.
- [Use TRTCVideoDecoder Fallback Plugin](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/rtcengine/plugins/video-decoder.md): Use trtc-sdk-v5 TRTCVideoDecoder plugin for automatic fallback to software decoding (wasm) when hardware decoding fails.
- [Use VideoMixer Plugin](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/rtcengine/plugins/video-mixer.md): Use trtc-sdk-v5 VideoMixer plugin to mix camera, screen, text, images, video into one stream.
- [Use VirtualBackground Plugin](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/rtcengine/plugins/virtual-background.md): Use trtc-sdk-v5 VirtualBackground plugin for background blur and custom background image replacement (portrait segmentation).
- [Use VoiceChanger Plugin](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/rtcengine/plugins/voice-changer.md): Use trtc-sdk-v5 VoiceChanger plugin for 11 voice effects: child/little girl/man/cold/ethereal/fatso/foreigner/trapped beast/heavy metal/strong current/heavy machinery.
- [Use Watermark Video Plugin](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/rtcengine/plugins/watermark.md): Use trtc-sdk-v5 Watermark plugin to add image watermarks to local video streams with position, size and opacity configuration.
- [TRTC Web SDK API Reference](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/rtcengine/reference/api.md): View complete trtc-sdk-v5 API: TRTC.create(), enterRoom(), exitRoom(), startLocalVideo(), startLocalAudio(), publish(), subscribe() methods and events.

### TRTC Native SDK API
> TRTC Native SDK API reference covering Android, iOS and C++ platform interfaces.

#### Android
- [Android TRTC SDK TRTCCloud API Reference](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/trtc/android/TRTCCloud.md): View Android TRTC SDK TRTCCloud API: enterRoom()/exitRoom()/startLocalVideo()/startLocalAudio()/switchRoom() methods.
- [Android TRTC SDK TRTCCloudDef Type Definitions](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/trtc/android/TRTCCloudDef.md): View Android TRTC SDK type definitions: TRTCParams (room params)/TRTCVideoEncParam (video encoding)/TRTCNetworkQosParam (network QoS).
- [Android TRTC SDK TRTCCloudListener Event Callbacks](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/trtc/android/TRTCCloudListener.md): View Android TRTC SDK event callbacks: onEnterRoom()/onExitRoom()/onUserVideoAvailable()/onNetworkQuality() listeners.
- [Android TRTC SDK TRTCStatistics](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/trtc/android/TRTCStatistics.md): View Android TRTC SDK audio/video statistics: bitrate/frame rate/resolution/packet loss/latency data structures.
- [Android TRTC SDK TXAudioEffectManager Audio Effects](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/trtc/android/TXAudioEffectManager.md): View Android TRTC SDK audio effect APIs: playBGM()/setVoiceChangerType()/setVoiceReverbType() for BGM, voice changer, reverb.
- [Android TRTC SDK TXBeautyManager Beauty Effects](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/trtc/android/TXBeautyManager.md): View Android TRTC SDK beauty APIs: setBeautyLevel()/setWhitenessLevel()/setRuddyLevel() for smoothing, whitening, blushing.
- [Android TRTC SDK TXDeviceManager Device Management](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/trtc/android/TXDeviceManager.md): View Android TRTC SDK device management APIs: switchCamera()/setSystemVolumeType()/enableCameraTorch() for camera and audio device control.
- [Android TRTC SDK TXLiteAVCode Error Codes](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/trtc/android/TXLiteAVCode.md): View Android TRTC SDK error and warning code list to quickly identify room entry failures and stream issues.

#### iOS
- [iOS TRTC SDK TRTCCloud API Reference](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/trtc/ios/TRTCCloud.md): View iOS TRTC SDK TRTCCloud API: enterRoom()/exitRoom()/startLocalVideo()/startLocalAudio()/switchRoom() methods.
- [iOS TRTC SDK TRTCCloudDef Type Definitions](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/trtc/ios/TRTCCloudDef.md): View iOS TRTC SDK type definitions: TRTCParams (room params)/TRTCVideoEncParam (video encoding)/TRTCNetworkQosParam (network QoS) and other data structures.
- [iOS TRTC SDK TRTCCloudDelegate Event Callbacks](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/trtc/ios/TRTCCloudDelegate.md): View iOS TRTC SDK event callbacks: onEnterRoom()/onExitRoom()/onUserVideoAvailable()/onNetworkQuality() delegate methods.
- [iOS TRTC SDK TRTCStatistics](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/trtc/ios/TRTCStatistics.md): View iOS TRTC SDK audio/video statistics: bitrate/frame rate/resolution/packet loss/latency data structures.
- [iOS TRTC SDK TXAudioEffectManager Audio Effects](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/trtc/ios/TXAudioEffectManager.md): View iOS TRTC SDK audio effect APIs: playBGM()/setVoiceChangerType()/setVoiceReverbType() for BGM, voice changer, reverb.
- [iOS TRTC SDK TXBeautyManager Beauty Effects](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/trtc/ios/TXBeautyManager.md): View iOS TRTC SDK beauty APIs: setBeautyLevel()/setWhitenessLevel()/setRuddyLevel() for smoothing, whitening, blushing.
- [iOS TRTC SDK TXDeviceManager Device Management](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/trtc/ios/TXDeviceManager.md): View iOS TRTC SDK device management APIs: switchCamera()/setSystemVolumeType()/enableCameraTorch() for camera and audio device control.
- [iOS TRTC SDK TXLiteAVCode Error Codes](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/trtc/ios/TXLiteAVCode.md): View iOS TRTC SDK error and warning code list to quickly identify room entry failures and stream issues.

#### C++
- [C++ TRTC SDK ITRTCCloud API Reference](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/trtc/cpp/ITRTCCloud.md): View C++ TRTC SDK ITRTCCloud API: enterRoom()/exitRoom()/startLocalVideo()/startLocalAudio() methods.
- [C++ TRTC SDK ITRTCStatistics](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/trtc/cpp/ITRTCStatistics.md): View C++ TRTC SDK audio/video statistics: bitrate/frame rate/resolution/packet loss/latency data structures.
- [C++ TRTC SDK ITXAudioEffectManager Audio Effects](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/trtc/cpp/ITXAudioEffectManager.md): View C++ TRTC SDK audio effect APIs: playBGM()/setVoiceChangerType()/setVoiceReverbType() for BGM, voice changer, reverb.
- [C++ TRTC SDK ITXDeviceManager Device Management](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/trtc/cpp/ITXDeviceManager.md): View C++ TRTC SDK device management APIs: getDevicesList()/setCurrentDevice() for audio/video device enumeration and control.
- [C++ TRTC SDK TRTCCloudCallback Event Callbacks](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/trtc/cpp/TRTCCloudCallback.md): View C++ TRTC SDK event callback interface: onEnterRoom()/onExitRoom()/onUserVideoAvailable() callback methods.
- [C++ TRTC SDK TRTCTypeDef Type Definitions](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/trtc/cpp/TRTCTypeDef.md): View C++ TRTC SDK type definitions: TRTCParams (room params)/TRTCVideoEncParam (video encoding)/TRTCNetworkQosParam (network QoS).
- [C++ TRTC SDK TXLiteAVCode Error Codes](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/trtc/cpp/TXLiteAVCode.md): View C++ TRTC SDK error and warning code list to quickly identify room entry failures and stream issues.

### Native Live SDK API
> Tencent Cloud Live Native SDK API reference covering pusher, player and global configuration interfaces.

#### Android
- [Android Live SDK V2TXLiveCode Error Codes](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/native-live/android/V2TXLiveCode.md): View Android Live SDK error code list to quickly identify stream pushing failures, pulling exceptions and audio/video capture issues.
- [Android Live SDK V2TXLiveDef Type Definitions](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/native-live/android/V2TXLiveDef.md): View Android Live SDK type definitions: V2TXLiveVideoResolution (resolution)/V2TXLiveVideoFillMode (fill mode)/V2TXLiveRotation (rotation).
- [Android Live SDK V2TXLivePlayer API Reference](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/native-live/android/V2TXLivePlayer.md): View Android Live SDK V2TXLivePlayer API: setRenderView()/startLivePlay()/stopPlay()/setPlayoutVolume() stream pulling methods.
- [Android Live SDK V2TXLivePlayerObserver Player Callbacks](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/native-live/android/V2TXLivePlayerObserver.md): View Android Live SDK player event callbacks: onConnected()/onVideoPlaying()/onAudioPlaying()/onPlayoutVolumeUpdate() listeners.
- [Android Live SDK V2TXLivePremier Global Configuration](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/native-live/android/V2TXLivePremier.md): View Android Live SDK global configuration API: setLicence()/setLogLevel()/setConsoleEnabled() SDK initialization methods.
- [Android Live SDK V2TXLivePusher API Reference](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/native-live/android/V2TXLivePusher.md): View Android Live SDK V2TXLivePusher API: setRenderView()/startCamera()/startMicrophone()/startPush() stream pushing methods.
- [Android Live SDK V2TXLivePusherObserver Pusher Callbacks](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/native-live/android/V2TXLivePusherObserver.md): View Android Live SDK pusher event callbacks: onPushStatusUpdate()/onCaptureFirstVideoFrame()/onMicrophoneVolumeUpdate() listeners.

#### iOS
- [iOS Live SDK V2TXLiveCode Error Codes](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/native-live/ios/V2TXLiveCode.md): View iOS Live SDK error code list to quickly identify stream pushing failures, pulling exceptions and audio/video capture issues.
- [iOS Live SDK V2TXLiveDef Type Definitions](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/native-live/ios/V2TXLiveDef.md): View iOS Live SDK type definitions: V2TXLiveVideoResolution (resolution)/V2TXLiveVideoFillMode (fill mode)/V2TXLiveRotation (rotation).
- [iOS Live SDK V2TXLivePlayer API Reference](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/native-live/ios/V2TXLivePlayer.md): View iOS Live SDK V2TXLivePlayer API: setRenderView()/startLivePlay()/stopPlay()/setPlayoutVolume() stream pulling methods.
- [iOS Live SDK V2TXLivePlayerObserver Player Callbacks](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/native-live/ios/V2TXLivePlayerObserver.md): View iOS Live SDK player event callbacks: onConnected()/onVideoPlaying()/onAudioPlaying()/onPlayoutVolumeUpdate() delegate methods.
- [iOS Live SDK V2TXLivePremier Global Configuration](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/native-live/ios/V2TXLivePremier.md): View iOS Live SDK global configuration API: setLicence()/setLogLevel()/setConsoleEnabled() SDK initialization methods.
- [iOS Live SDK V2TXLivePusher API Reference](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/native-live/ios/V2TXLivePusher.md): View iOS Live SDK V2TXLivePusher API: setRenderView()/startCamera()/startMicrophone()/startPush() stream pushing methods.
- [iOS Live SDK V2TXLivePusherObserver Pusher Callbacks](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/native-live/ios/V2TXLivePusherObserver.md): View iOS Live SDK pusher event callbacks: onPushStatusUpdate()/onCaptureFirstVideoFrame()/onMicrophoneVolumeUpdate() delegate methods.

#### Flutter
- [Flutter Live SDK V2TXLiveCode Error Codes](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/native-live/flutter/V2TXLiveCode.md): View Flutter Live SDK error code list to quickly identify stream pushing failures, pulling exceptions and audio/video capture issues.
- [Flutter Live SDK V2TXLiveDef Type Definitions](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/native-live/flutter/V2TXLiveDef.md): View Flutter Live SDK type definitions: V2TXLiveVideoResolution, V2TXLiveVideoFillMode, etc.
- [Flutter Live SDK V2TXLivePlayer API Reference](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/native-live/flutter/V2TXLivePlayer.md): View Flutter Live SDK V2TXLivePlayer API: setRenderViewID()/startLivePlay()/stopPlay()/setPlayoutVolume() stream pulling methods.
- [Flutter Live SDK V2TXLivePlayerObserver Player Callbacks](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/native-live/flutter/V2TXLivePlayerObserver.md): View Flutter Live SDK player event callbacks: onConnected()/onVideoPlaying()/onAudioPlaying()/onPlayoutVolumeUpdate() listeners.
- [Flutter Live SDK V2TXLivePremier Global Configuration](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/native-live/flutter/V2TXLivePremier.md): View Flutter Live SDK global configuration API: setLicence()/setLogConfig() SDK initialization methods.
- [Flutter Live SDK V2TXLivePusher API Reference](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/native-live/flutter/V2TXLivePusher.md): View Flutter Live SDK V2TXLivePusher API: setRenderViewID()/startCamera()/startMicrophone()/startPush() stream pushing methods.
- [Flutter Live SDK V2TXLivePusherObserver Pusher Callbacks](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lianjun0809/docs/main/en/native-live/flutter/V2TXLivePusherObserver.md): View Flutter Live SDK pusher event callbacks: onPushStatusUpdate()/onCaptureFirstVideoFrame()/onMicrophoneVolumeUpdate() listeners.
